descriptionPlain:
The Sr. Account-Based Marketing Specialist leads strategic account development initiatives for Aledade’s highest-value prospects. The role is responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing account-based marketing strategies that drive company growth and market expansion. This position possesses substantial authority to make high-impact decisions regarding account selection, resource allocation, campaign design, and execution with minimal oversight. The Specialist directly influences business operations through the creation of account-specific value propositions and active management of complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles. 
 
We are flexible with respect to geographic location, and the ideal candidate will be comfortable working remotely/work from home within the US or be based from Bethesda, MD office.
description:
The Sr. Account-Based Marketing Specialist leads strategic account development initiatives for Aledade’s highest-value prospects. The role is responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing account-based marketing strategies that drive company growth and market expansion. This position possesses substantial authority to make high-impact decisions regarding account selection, resource allocation, campaign design, and execution with minimal oversight. The Specialist directly influences business operations through the creation of account-specific value propositions and active management of complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles. 
 
We are flexible with respect to geographic location, and the ideal candidate will be comfortable working remotely/work from home within the US or be based from Bethesda, MD office.

lists.content:
• Directs the development and continuous improvement of integrated marketing campaigns, using analytical skills and market intelligence to drive operational decision-making.
  • Leads comprehensive analysis of target accounts, identifying business opportunities and crafting account penetration strategies.
  • Exercises authority in prioritizing accounts, allocating marketing resources, and establishing account engagement protocols.
  • Independently develops content strategies and tactical execution plans tailored to complex buying committees.
  • Makes strategic pivots to campaign methodologies based on objective data and market trends.
  • Establishes success criteria, evaluates campaign effectiveness, and implements process enhancements that impact revenue growth.
  • Identifies, engages, and maps key stakeholders using persona mapping and market research.
  • Drives outreach strategies and curates content to nurture high-value prospects from initial contact through qualified opportunity.
  • Shares market insights and recommendations with leadership and cross-functional teams.
  • Designs, optimizes, and enforces protocols for CRM documentation, lead transitions, and collaboration frameworks that streamline business development.
  • Advises and supports cross-functional teams in implementing account-based strategies, acting as a subject matter expert within the organization.
  • Tracks performance against KPIs, analyzes outcomes, and reports findings to inform future strategy.
  • Recommends and implements strategic pivots and process changes that impact company objectives and market share.

• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Healthcare Administration, or related field.
  • At least 6 years of experience in sales, business development, or related roles in the healthcare industry.
  • Proven track record in leveraging account-based marketing tactics to generate leads within complex sales environments.

• Demonstrate a strong understanding of healthcare market dynamics and trends with an emphasis on value-based care models.
  • Exceptional communication and negotiation skills with the ability to build and nurture long-term professional relationships.
  • High level of organization and time management skills, enabling effective prioritization in a fast-paced environment.
  • Experience with CRM systems like Salesforce and Sales cadence software like Outreach, with proficiency in managing relationships and measuring success
  • Proactive and adaptable approach, thriving in dynamic and evolving market landscapes.

• Must carry a valid driver’s license and be able to drive within assigned territory
  • Must be able to travel via plane when needed
  • Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.
  • Standing or walking for hours at a time and occasionally lifting and carrying up to 25lbs

descriptionPlain:
Aledade is actively recruiting a Senior Accountant to assist in reviewing and accounting for payments to our partner practices. The Senior Accountant will be responsible for calculating and preparing all distributions made to our partner practices and ensure the amounts paid are in accordance with the participation agreements. This person will also work across the company on any contractual requirements related to provider payments and Participation Agreements. This role requires an extreme attention to detail and the candidate must have a track record of generating and maintaining systems of record.   The ideal candidate for this role is fluent with U.S. GAAP, demonstrates excellent critical thinking skills, is able to work diligently and accurately, and is technologically savvy.
 
We are flexible with respect to geographic location, and the ideal candidate will be comfortable working remotely/work from home within the US or be based from Bethesda, MD office.
description:

This person will also work across the company on any contractual requirements related to provider payments and Participation Agreements. This role requires an extreme attention to detail and the candidate must have a track record of generating and maintaining systems of record.   The ideal candidate for this role is fluent with U.S. GAAP, demonstrates excellent critical thinking skills, is able to work diligently and accurately, and is technologically savvy.
 
We are flexible with respect to geographic location, and the ideal candidate will be comfortable working remotely/work from home within the US or be based from Bethesda, MD office.

lists.content:
• Assist in the processing and calculation of the practice portion estimates. Prepare month-end reporting workbooks related to practice portion expense, including related journal entries and reconciliations. Prepare monthly accrual entries based on cash distributions made to practices, and payments received to be distributed. Assist with month-end review of financial statements, preparing variance analysis and ensuring accounting activities are well supported and documented
  • Understand contract terms to ensure the distribution of monthly and/or quarterly payments to practice are in line with the contracts; serve as a liaison between Aledade Finance/Accounting and Aledade practices/markets to communicate payment distribution. Keep detailed records of payment distributions and Communicate with internal and external stakeholders regarding the receipt of payment, calculation of practice payments. 
  • Perform data analysis using advanced excel skills, including but not limited to pivot tables, V-lookup, accounting functions, and other queries. Experience with macros preferred, but not required. Keep detailed records of payment distributions for both internal audiences and practice requests.
  • Assist Contract manager with the maintenance of the contract repository system
  • Assist with external Audit requests as needed including preparation for ongoing support

• A degree in Finance or Accounting and/or CPA
  • 5+ years of work experience, preferably with experience supporting public companies
  • 2+ years of related experience working in the healthcare industry (i.e., health plan, hospital, government, management consulting, think tank) with a proven track record of successfully managing projects and interfacing with internal or external stakeholders

• Strong technical and analytical skills
  • SQL or database querying experience preferred
  • Deep understanding and expertise with excel and/or google sheets to enable the calculation and distribution of incentive payments.
  • A strong work ethic and the ability to adapt to rapid business changes that accompanies a high growth environment.
  • Outstanding interpersonal and communication skills and a demonstrated ability to work cross functionality at various levels within a company, as well as with external auditors.
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard.

descriptionPlain:
The Senior Actuarial Analyst will support financial evaluation related analytics and research for Commercial and Medicaid lines of business.  Key functions include:
Applying actuarial principles to build models and perform analysis that supports Aledade's forecast process, risk management initiatives, and contracting efforts.
Working with healthcare data from various sources, including health plans, public data sources, and consulting firms, to perform actuarial analysis and generate insights for business strategy development.
Becoming a data expert for the financial structure and methodology of value-based contracting to contribute to fact-based business decision making.
description:
The Senior Actuarial Analyst will support financial evaluation related analytics and research for Commercial and Medicaid lines of business.  Key functions include:

  1. Applying actuarial principles to build models and perform analysis that supports Aledade's forecast process, risk management initiatives, and contracting efforts.

  2. Working with healthcare data from various sources, including health plans, public data sources, and consulting firms, to perform actuarial analysis and generate insights for business strategy development.

  3. Becoming a data expert for the financial structure and methodology of value-based contracting to contribute to fact-based business decision making.

lists.content:
1. Understand the problem space: Work with teams across Aledade to understand and clarify questions and issues for data analysis.

  2. Data extraction and validation: extract, validate, and incorporate data from diverse data sources into actuarial models and analyses.

  1. Design and execute actuarial analysis: Design actuarial analyses and build actuarial models to answer key business questions and generate actionable insights and solutions.

  2. Assist in translating and communicating analysis results: Work with one’s manager and other teams across Aledade to synthesize results, identify implications, and translate findings into action.

• Bachelor's degree with 2-4 years of actuarial or related experience

  • Two SOA exams toward the ASA credential

  • Experience with actuarial analysis and model building

  • Experience with health care data sources such as medical claims, membership, and risk scores

• Bachelor’s degree in statistics, mathematics or computer science

  • 3-4 SOA components toward the ASA credential

  • Experience with SQL for data manipulation and R, Python, or Stata for statistical programming

  • Demonstrated ability to conduct nuanced analyses to produce accurate and unbiased results and tell the story of those results in data visualizations, presentations, and reports.

  • Attention to detail, quality assurance, documentation, and building repeatable processes

  • Knowledge of standard methods for measuring health care utilization, spending, quality, and related outcomes

  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage competing deadlines and priorities.

  • Committed to serving teammates and patients with empathy and respect

  • Thinks beyond their immediate team and contributes to making Aledade holistically better (active engagement in employee resource groups, DE&I initiatives, book/journal clubs, facilitating training, leading roundtables, etc.)
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
The Senior Director of Payments Solutions is a highly visible and mission-critical role that will lead the technical transformation of Aledade's Practice Payments operations. Reporting to the VP of Enterprise Applications, this role will oversee the technical team and solutions architecture required to scale our payment operations from current levels (24+ payment types) to over $2B in annual Practice Payments within 2-3 years. This position is essential to Aledade's ability to fulfill our contractual payment obligations to healthcare practice partners and will directly impact our operational success and growth trajectory. 

We are looking for a player-coach who is hands-on and is able to scale across strategic topics as well as get into the details and work alongside their team. The Sr. Director must be highly collaborative and effective at working across business functions and organizational boundaries. Success in this role is highly dependent on the ability to be collaborative and effectively influence across the organization.
description:
The Senior Director of Payments Solutions is a highly visible and mission-critical role that will lead the technical transformation of Aledade's Practice Payments operations. Reporting to the VP of Enterprise Applications, this role will oversee the technical team and solutions architecture required to scale our payment operations from current levels (24+ payment types) to over $2B in annual Practice Payments within 2-3 years. This position is essential to Aledade's ability to fulfill our contractual payment obligations to healthcare practice partners and will directly impact our operational success and growth trajectory.

We are looking for a player-coach who is hands-on and is able to scale across strategic topics as well as get into the details and work alongside their team. The Sr. Director must be highly collaborative and effective at working across business functions and organizational boundaries. Success in this role is highly dependent on the ability to be collaborative and effectively influence across the organization.

lists.content:
• Technical Solutions Leadership
  • Lead the Payment Solutions technical team (Business Analyst, 2 System Administrators to start, additional team growth is expected) in designing and implementing scalable payment solutions
  • Oversee current payment technology stack and drive optimization of existing solutions (QuickCap, NetSuite, etc.)
  • Spearhead the evaluation and implementation of a second payment solution to handle non-claims based payment types
  • Ensure payment systems architecture can scale to support $2B+ in annual payment volume
  • Drive automation initiatives to eliminate manual processes between market leaders, central business owners, Payments and Finance teams
  • Team Building & Leadership
  • Manage and develop initial team of 3 direct reports (1 Business Analyst, 2 System Administrators)
  • Build strategic hiring plan and organizational structure to scale the Payments team in alignment with business growth
  • Define roles, responsibilities, and career progression paths for expanding payment operations team
  • Foster a culture of technical excellence, continuous improvement, and operational reliability
  • Establish team processes and methodologies to support rapid scaling while maintaining quality
  • Process Architecture & Standardization
  • Design standardized, scalable workflows for all 24+ payment types currently managed
  • Develop technical specifications and requirements for payment processing improvements
  • Create systematic approaches to bank reconciliation processes to address current pain points
  • Establish playbook (including technical guardrails, approval workflows and org-wide implications) to facilitate standing up new payment types
  • Cross-Functional Partnership & Governance
  • Partner with Security team to ensure payment solutions meet cybersecurity and data protection standards
  • Collaborate with CRG (Compliance, Risk, Governance) team on regulatory requirements and governance frameworks
  • Work closely with Growth, Provider Networks, and Finance teams to ensure streamlined handoffs for full end-to-end processes, in compliance with audit and SOX requirements
  • Support Growth and Provider Networks teams by defining technical feasibility parameters for new payment options during contract negotiations
  • Work with Engineering and Analytics teams to ensure compliance with organizational data architecture standards
  • Systems Integration & Management
  • Oversee integration between payment solutions and existing enterprise applications
  • Ensure seamless data flow between payment systems, financial systems, and reporting platforms
  • Standardize the user experience across the various payment systems and processes
  • Manage vendor relationships for payment technology solutions
  • Drive system performance monitoring and optimization initiatives
  • Strategic Planning & Execution
  • Develop technical roadmap for payment solutions that aligns with business growth projections
  • Create scalability assessments and capacity planning for payment infrastructure
  • Establish technical KPIs and metrics for payment system performance and reliability
  • Support enterprise-wide Payments Excellence program with technical expertise and solutions

• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Information Systems, Finance, or related technical field; advanced degree preferred
  • 12+ years of experience managing payments technology, financial systems, or enterprise applications
  • 3-5 years of experience implementing payment systems, processes, and related technology and support adoption by working with business partners and stakeholders
  • 5+ years of management experience leading technical teams, with demonstrated ability to scale organizations
  • Extensive hands-on experience with payment processing systems and financial technology platforms
  • Proven track record scaling payment operations in high-growth environments
  • Strong understanding of payment reconciliation, financial controls, and audit requirements
  • Experience with enterprise system integrations and data management
  • Demonstrated ability to manage complex, high-visibility technical initiatives
  • Experience building and scaling technical teams from startup through enterprise levels

• Experience with QuickCap, NetSuite, or similar enterprise payment/ERP solutions
  • Ideal candidate will have deep healthcare industry expertise, particularly in value-based care models and payor contract structures, to ensure our practice payment solutions meet all specialized accounting requirements
  • Background in financial services or fintech environments
  • Experience with API integrations and payment gateway technologies
  • Knowledge of banking systems, ACH processing, and financial reconciliation platforms
  • Project management certification (PMP) or similar credentials
  • Strong communication skills for presenting to executive-level stakeholders
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
The Senior Manager, Performance Data Operations serves as the analytical powerhouse behind Aledade’s Population Health Impact performance improvement initiatives. This role acts as the dedicated data and program lead for the Population Health Performance Improvement team, operating with a high degree of autonomy to inform the design, execution, and continuous improvement of initiatives that advance health equity, quality, and cost outcomes for high‑risk populations.
This role bridges raw data, operational workflows, and organizational strategy. This role will:
Build and maintain complex datasets and high‑impact population health analytics (especially Tableau and SQL‑backed models).
Lead cross‑functional projects and programs that embed population health measures into the way we operate and measure success.
Drive cycles of performance improvement by combining advanced analytics, investigative data analysis, and value stream mapping with strong project and stakeholder management.
The ideal candidate is a highly self‑directed and strategic thinker who is equally comfortable writing complex queries, designing equity‑focused metrics, facilitating cross‑functional working sessions, and presenting clear, compelling narratives to executives and field teams. This individual thrives at the intersection of analytics, strategy, and operational execution.

lists.content:
• Data Strategy, Analytics, and BI: Execute the Population Health Impact Performance Improvement Vision & Roadmap by building, maintaining, and documenting complex, scalable datasets for Population Health analytics.
  • Performance Improvement and Program Management: Lead end‑to‑end program management for Population Health Impact initiatives, from problem definition and scoping through planning, execution, monitoring, and sustainment.
  • Actionable Insights & Executive Communication: Transform complex findings into clear, actionable insights for audiences including executives, field teams, and practice partners.
  • Stakeholder & Change Management: Build strong, trust-based cross-functional relationships and ensure alignment on priorities, requirements, and timelines for Population Health performance improvement initiatives.Partner with field teams to identify market/practice opportunities, develop innovative reporting, and provide insights supporting high-risk populations.

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Analytics, Data Science, Public Health, or a related quantitative field.
  • Expert‑level proficiency in Tableau and SQL (or similar BI and querying tools) with a track record of building and analyzing complex, scalable datasets.
  • 8+ years of progressive, relevant experience in population health, healthcare analytics, performance improvement, or closely related fields.
  • Demonstrated ability to perform investigative data analysis, including population segmentation, stratification, and cohort analysis.

• Ability to translate abstract population health goals into concrete analytical frameworks and technical roadmaps.
  • Strong analytical skills to identify organizational needs, define KPIs, and monitor and evaluate population health  metrics and dashboards.
  • Demonstrated experience leading programs or projects, including setting direction, building consensus, managing risk, and communicating progress.
  • Proven ability to manage and prioritize data products that offer the highest value to the organization.
  • Mastery of executive-level reporting; ability to present complex population health gaps and efficacy data to a diverse group of stakeholders.
  • Demonstrated alignment with equity‑centered, community‑informed approaches to population health and performance improvement.

• Sitting for prolonged periods of time.
  • Extensive use of computers and keyboard.
  • Occasional walking and lifting may be required.
  • Travel up to 25%

text: Senior Manager, Performance Data Operations, Remote
descriptionBody:
The Senior Manager, Performance Data Operations serves as the analytical powerhouse behind Aledade’s Population Health Impact performance improvement initiatives. This role acts as the dedicated data and program lead for the Population Health Performance Improvement team, operating with a high degree of autonomy to inform the design, execution, and continuous improvement of initiatives that advance health equity, quality, and cost outcomes for high‑risk populations.

This role bridges raw data, operational workflows, and organizational strategy. This role will:

  • Build and maintain complex datasets and high‑impact population health analytics (especially Tableau and SQL‑backed models).

  • Lead cross‑functional projects and programs that embed population health measures into the way we operate and measure success.

  • Drive cycles of performance improvement by combining advanced analytics, investigative data analysis, and value stream mapping with strong project and stakeholder management.

The ideal candidate is a highly self‑directed and strategic thinker who is equally comfortable writing complex queries, designing equity‑focused metrics, facilitating cross‑functional working sessions, and presenting clear, compelling narratives to executives and field teams. This individual thrives at the intersection of analytics, strategy, and operational execution.

Who We Are:
Aledade, a public benefit corporation, exists to empower the most transformational part of our health care landscape - independent primary care. We were founded in 2014, and since then, we've become the largest network of independent primary care in the country - helping practices, health centers and clinics deliver better care to their patients and thrive in value-based care. Additionally, by creating value-based contracts across a wide variety of health plans, we aim to flip the script on the traditional fee-for-service model. Our work strengthens continuity of care, aligns incentives and ensures primary care physicians are paid for what they do best - keeping patients healthy. If you want to help create a health care system that is good for patients, good for practices and good for society - and if you're eager to join a collaborative, inclusive and remote-first culture - you've come to the right place.

What Does This Mean for You?
At Aledade, you will be part of a creative culture that is driven by a passion for tackling complex issues with respect, open-mindedness and a desire to learn. You will collaborate with team members who bring a wide range of experiences, interests, backgrounds, beliefs and achievements to their work - and who are all united by a shared passion for public health and a commitment to the Aledade mission.

In addition to time off to support work-life balance and enjoyment, we offer the following comprehensive benefits package designed for the overall well-being of our team members:

Flexible work schedules and the ability to work remotely are available for many roles
Health, dental and vision insurance paid up to 80% for employees, dependents and domestic partners
Robust time-off plan (21 days of PTO in your first year)
Two paid volunteer days and 11 paid holidays

Stock options
And much more!

descriptionPlain:
As a Senior Network Security Engineer II you will lead the design, implementation, and maintenance of our organization’s network security infrastructure. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in network security, a passion for building secure systems, and proven leadership experience in managing engineering teams and design, implement, and maintain secure network infrastructures for and cloud environments. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in network security technologies, networking in cloud platforms, and a proactive mindset to protect against evolving threats. This role involves working closely with cross-functional teams to ensure the highest levels of security and compliance for our network architecture while aligning with the company’s business objectives.
This role will support the architecture, design, implementation, and operations of the company network and cloud infrastructure.  This role will also be involved in leading-edge expertise to manage critical incidents and problems, and deliver consistent and reliable network operations including DDI, Firewall, VPN and load balancing.  This candidate will provide technical leadership and coach junior members of the network security team.
description:
As a Senior Network Security Engineer II you will lead the design, implementation, and maintenance of our organization’s network security infrastructure. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in network security, a passion for building secure systems, and proven leadership experience in managing engineering teams and design, implement, and maintain secure network infrastructures for and cloud environments. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in network security technologies, networking in cloud platforms, and a proactive mindset to protect against evolving threats. This role involves working closely with cross-functional teams to ensure the highest levels of security and compliance for our network architecture while aligning with the company’s business objectives.

This role will support the architecture, design, implementation, and operations of the company network and cloud infrastructure.  This role will also be involved in leading-edge expertise to manage critical incidents and problems, and deliver consistent and reliable network operations including DDI, Firewall, VPN and load balancing.  This candidate will provide technical leadership and coach junior members of the network security team.

lists.content:
1. Design, implement, and manage secure network solutions, including firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion prevention systems (IPS), for cloud-based environments.

    1. Configure and secure networking services in cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, including Virtual Private Clouds (VPCs), security groups, and network gateways.

    2. Monitor cloud network activity to detect, analyze, and respond to security threats and vulnerabilities. Oversee network segmentation, encryption, and secure access mechanisms to safeguard sensitive data and systems.

    3. Deploy and manage advanced network security technologies, such as Zero Trust Architecture, SD-WAN, and SASE solutions, across hybrid infrastructures.

  2. Conduct regular network security assessments, including penetration testing and vulnerability scans, in both traditional and cloud-native environments.

  3. Develop and enforce network security policies, standards, and guidelines for hybrid environments and collaborate with cloud engineering teams to implement security best practices in cloud deployments.

  4. Maintain up-to-date documentation of network security architectures, configurations, and cloud networking setups.

  5. Troubleshoot and resolve complex network security issues across corporate IT infra and cloud platforms.

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related field.

  • 7+ years of experience in network security engineering or related roles, including experience with cloud networking and security.

• Expertise in securing cloud environments such as AWS (e.g., VPCs, IAM, Security Groups), Azure (e.g., VNets, NSGs, Azure Firewall), or GCP (e.g., Cloud Armor, Cloud VPN).

  • Hands-on experience with network security tools including firewalls, VPNs, IDS/IPS, encryption, DLP (Zscaler, Palo Alto etc).

  • Hands-on experience with network security monitoring tools (eg: wireshark), SIEMs, and incident response.

  • Familiarity with Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) tools like Terraform or CloudFormation for networking automation.

  • Certifications such as AWS Certified Advanced Networking Specialty, CCNP Security, or equivalent are highly desirable.

  • Familiarity with DevSecOps and security monitoring in CI/CD environments and

  • containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes).

  • Experience with Zero Trust models, microsegmentation, and cloud-native security solutions (e.g., AWS Security Hub, Azure Sentinel).

  • Experience leading large-scale network security projects, from planning and implementation to monitoring and assessment.

  • Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills, with attention to detail.

  • Previous experience in healthcare, finance, or government sectors, particularly in managing network security within compliance frameworks like HIPAA, PCI-DSS, or SOX.

  • Ability to automate network security tasks using Python, Bash, or other scripting languages, improving efficiency and response times for security events.

  • Excellent communication and documentation abilities.

  • Strong background in handling network-related incidents and conducting forensic analysis to uncover the cause and impact of security breaches.

  • Certifications such as CISSP, CCNP, CEH, or similar are strongly preferred.
Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
We are seeking a highly skilled Salesforce technical developer to lead the design, development, and
implementation of scalable and high-performance Salesforce solutions. This role is responsible for
providing architectural guidance across all Salesforce products, including Sales Cloud, Service Cloud,
Experience Cloud, and custom applications built on the Salesforce Platform.
 
The ideal candidate will possess extensive expertise in Salesforce architecture, integration patterns, data
modeling, and system design, enabling effective alignment of Salesforce capabilities with business
objectives. Collaboration with business stakeholders, cross-functional teams, and third-party partners is
essential to ensure the optimization of the Salesforce platform for performance, security, and scalability.
This role demands significant technical acumen and the ability to mentor and guide development teams
towards excellence.
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Salesforce technical developer to lead the design, development, and
implementation of scalable and high-performance Salesforce solutions. This role is responsible for
providing architectural guidance across all Salesforce products, including Sales Cloud, Service Cloud,
Experience Cloud, and custom applications built on the Salesforce Platform.
 
The ideal candidate will possess extensive expertise in Salesforce architecture, integration patterns, data
modeling, and system design, enabling effective alignment of Salesforce capabilities with business
objectives. Collaboration with business stakeholders, cross-functional teams, and third-party partners is
essential to ensure the optimization of the Salesforce platform for performance, security, and scalability.
This role demands significant technical acumen and the ability to mentor and guide development teams
towards excellence.

lists.content:
• This role will work directly with the project team and business. Responsible for tracking the enterprise portfolio and driving project teams in shaping consistent architecture across the Salesforce platform.
  • Manage the design, development, and implementation of scalable Salesforce solutions across various clouds (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud) and custom applications. The role also requires definition, documentation, roadmap for current and future states, and resolves technical issues in areas of ownership.
  • Mentor development teams and provide technical support and quality assurance throughout all project stages, addressing technical challenges as they arise. Define and document architectural designs, build plans, release strategies, and technical specifications to ensure adherence to standards and governance processes
  • Manage integrations with upstream downstream systems and with third- party services and ensure compliance with data governance policies during implementation phases.

• 6+ years of Salesforce Developer/Architect experience
  • Salesforce Admin, Sr. Admin, Developer, Platform, Application Architect certifications (Preferred)

• Defines systems architecture and specifications to align with company needs and future growth
  • Manages planning, evaluation, and selection of tech solutions, tools, and integration methods.
  • Solving technical problems when they arise
  • Guides project teams to design architectures aligned with platforms, roadmaps, and standards.
  • Monitors systems to ensure they meet both user needs and business goals
  • Manages, develops and implements plans to facilitate and coordinate delivery of technical services and support
  • Communicates requirements, supports implementation, and resolves technical issues.
  • Leads change control processes, documentation efforts, and compliance enforcement.
  • Experience with database design concepts, middleware concepts, and user interface development
  • Experience with 3rd Party integrations and popular AppExchange offerings
  • Experience with database design concepts, middleware concepts, and user interface development
  • Experience with custom development concepts such as flows, apex, triggers and web services in order to guide the Developers on your project team to implement your designs
  • Experience in Apex, VisualForce, Lightning Components, Force.com IDE, SFDC APIs, SOSL, SOQL, SOAP or REST based web services, SQL, XML, JSON, CSS and JavaScript
  • Experience utilizing development frameworks and libraries, such as the Lightning Component Framework, Salesforce Lightning Design System, and jquery, or equivalent. 
  • Proficient in Salesforce tools, DevOps practices, and modern development frameworks.
• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer

lists.content:
• Primary focus will be on infrastructure security through architecture reviews, threat modeling for new and existing services and security tool implementations, while leveraging automation to scale security solutions.
  • Design, deploy, and manage advanced security tools, including SIEM, EDR, DLP, vulnerability management, and firewalls.
  • Engineer solutions to integrate security tooling across cloud environments, ensuring seamless protection and visibility. Collaborate with cloud engineering teams to implement and secure cloud-native solutions (e.g., IAM, VPC, security groups, cloud firewalls),  implement security controls for cloud infrastructure and containerized environments.
  • Lead the evaluation, implementation, and configuration of new security technologies to address evolving threats and stay updated on emerging technologies, trends, and best practices in security engineering and tooling.
  • Develop and maintain secure configurations for operating systems, applications, and networking equipment and Automate security processes using scripting languages (Python, PowerShell) and tools like Terraform or Ansible.
  • Conduct security assessments and ensure vulnerability management programs are effective, addressing gaps proactively.

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
  • 7+ years of experience in security engineering, including designing and managing security tools.
  • Strong understanding of Threat Modeling Principles
  • Experience with Security Incident Response & Risk Management
  • Strong hands-on expertise with SIEM (e.g., Splunk or Sumo logic), EDR (e.g., CrowdStrike, SentinelOne), and vulnerability management tools (e.g., Tenable, Qualys), Wiz, Snyk etc.
  • Proficiency in securing cloud environments (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including experience with IAM, VPCs, security groups, EKS/ECR and cloud-native security solutions (e.g., AWS Security Hub, Azure Sentinel).
  • Experience with automation tools IAC and CI/CD: Terraform, Helm, Chef, Ansible, Buildkite, Jenkins, ArgoCD and scripting (Python, PowerShell, or Bash) for integrating and managing security solutions.
  • Familiarity with DevSecOps practices, container security (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker), and CI/CD pipeline security.
  • Proven track record in incident response, threat hunting, and forensic investigations.
  • Certifications such as CISSP, GSEC, AWS Certified Security Specialty, or equivalent.

• Strongly Preferred:
  • Experience with Datadog for metrics and log analysis.
  • Experience in monitoring security tools and leading forensic investigations and helping in incident response efforts.
  • Experience with Security incident response & Risk Management.
  • Stay updated on emerging technologies, trends, and best practices in security engineering and tooling.
  • Experience with Zero Trust models, microsegmentation, and cloud-native security solutions (e.g., AWS Security Hub, Azure Sentinel).
  • Knowledge of regulatory frameworks (e.g., PCI DSS, GDPR, HIPAA) and how to engineer tools to support compliance.
  • Has mentored  junior engineers and provided technical leadership for security-focused initiatives.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with excellent communication and documentation abilities.
  • Previous experience in healthcare, finance, or government sectors, particularly in managing network security within compliance frameworks like HIPAA, PCI-DSS, or SOX.
  • Preferred:
  • Certifications such as CISSP, CCNP, CEH, or similar are strongly preferred.

descriptionBody: As a Senior Security Engineer  you will design, implement, and maintain security systems and tooling across our infrastructure. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in security engineering, an in-depth understanding of security tools, and a proactive approach to mitigating cybersecurity risks. This role involves both hands-on technical work, working closely with cross-functional teams and strategic collaboration to enhance our overall security posture. This candidate will provide technical leadership and coach junior members of the security engineering team.

additionalPlain:
Who We Are:
Aledade, a public benefit corporation, exists to empower the most transformational part of our health care landscape - independent primary care. We were founded in 2014, and since then, we've become the largest network of independent primary care in the country - helping practices, health centers and clinics deliver better care to their patients and thrive in value-based care. Additionally, by creating value-based contracts across a wide variety of health plans, we aim to flip the script on the traditional fee-for-service model. Our work strengthens continuity of care, aligns incentives and ensures primary care physicians are paid for what they do best - keeping patients healthy. If you want to help create a health care system that is good for patients, good for practices and good for society - and if you're eager to join a collaborative, inclusive and remote-first culture - you've come to the right place.

What Does This Mean for You?
At Aledade, you will be part of a creative culture that is driven by a passion for tackling complex issues with respect, open-mindedness and a desire to learn. You will collaborate with team members who bring a wide range of experiences, interests, backgrounds, beliefs and achievements to their work - and who are all united by a shared passion for public health and a commitment to the Aledade mission.

In addition to time off to support work-life balance and enjoyment, we offer the following comprehensive benefits package designed for the overall well-being of our team members:

Flexible work schedules and the ability to work remotely are available for many roles
Health, dental and vision insurance paid up to 80% for employees, dependents and domestic partners
Robust time-off plan (21 days of PTO in your first year)
Two paid volunteer days and 11 paid holidays
12 weeks paid parental leave for all new parents
Six weeks paid sabbatical after six years of service
Educational Assistant Program and Clinical Employee Reimbursement Program
401(k) with up to 4% match
Stock options
And much more!

At Aledade, we don’t just accept differences, we celebrate them! We strive to attract, develop and retain highly qualified individuals representing the diverse communities where we live and work. Aledade is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Employment policies and decisions at Aledade are based on merit, qualifications, performance and business needs. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, race, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth or medical conditions related to pregnancy or childbirth), gender identity or expression, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, legally protected genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or sexual orientation.

Privacy Policy: By applying for this job, you agree to Aledade's Applicant Privacy Policy available at  https://www.aledade.com/privacy-policy-applicants

descriptionPlain:
As a Senior Security Engineer II for Identity and Access Management (IAM) at Aledade, you will play a central role in enhancing the security posture of our enterprise, cloud-native environments, and applications. We are seeking a dedicated professional with in-depth knowledge of IAM principles, standards, and best practices to help safeguard our systems and support our security compliance initiatives.
 
In this role, you will work to design, implement, and maintain robust IAM solutions, managing authentication, authorization, and provisioning across diverse platforms. You will also collaborate closely with various teams to ensure alignment between IAM solutions and organizational security requirements, enabling secure and seamless access across the enterprise and cloud services. Your ability to partner cross-functionally will be key to driving impactful outcomes and further strengthening our digital landscape.
description:
As a Senior Security Engineer II for Identity and Access Management (IAM) at Aledade, you will play a central role in enhancing the security posture of our enterprise, cloud-native environments, and applications. We are seeking a dedicated professional with in-depth knowledge of IAM principles, standards, and best practices to help safeguard our systems and support our security compliance initiatives.
 
In this role, you will work to design, implement, and maintain robust IAM solutions, managing authentication, authorization, and provisioning across diverse platforms. You will also collaborate closely with various teams to ensure alignment between IAM solutions and organizational security requirements, enabling secure and seamless access across the enterprise and cloud services. Your ability to partner cross-functionally will be key to driving impactful outcomes and further strengthening our digital landscape.

lists.content:
• Working cross functionally to design, build, and operate solutions that continuously improve and automate our security capabilities
  • Leveraging data to understand trends, metrics, and opportunities to improve our security posture and then helping execute on those opportunities with stakeholders
  • Leading and enhancing incident response efforts, spearheading analysis, containment, and mitigation strategies in a cross-functional environment to ensure effective resolution and remediation of security incidents
  • Helping craft and refine security documentation pertinent to our Security Program, such as policies, standards, baselines, and standard operating procedures
  • Mentoring and coaching more junior engineers or analysts

• BS / BTech (or higher) in Computer Science, Information Technology, Cybersecurity or a related field, 8 years security domain experience without degree
  • 6+ years of experience in software or security engineering within Cloud Native environments
  • 4+ years of experience working with large datasets to identify opportunities for security posture improvements or to detect, investigate and respond to threats
  • 4+ years of experience acting as a trusted advisor in a team setting, solving for short-term and long-term business value
  • 4+ years of experience coaching other engineers or analysts

Identity & Access Management
  • Experience with Identity & Access Management (IaM) systems and practices
  • In-depth knowledge of authentication protocols, authorization  mechanisms, and directory services
  • Strong proficiency implementing IAM solutions within very complex environments
  • Familiarity with regulatory compliance and security standards
  • Experience generating automated metrics to measure service and program effectiveness and consistency
  • Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the capability to articulate complex security issues to a diverse audience
  • Automation skills : Powershell, Python, Terraform
  • Expertise on Okta products - Directory, SSO, MFA, Workflows, ISPM and IGA
  • Experience with tools in the security stack strongly preferred: Auth0/Entra ID/Ping Identity, Cloud Platforms - AWS/Azure/GCP
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
As a Senior Software Engineer I at Aledade, we maintain, improve, and expand our web application and data pipelines. We're looking for engineers who know that writing new code is not always the solution to a problem, but when technological changes are needed they create secure, maintainable, performant, correct, scalable, and stable solutions to the complex and unique challenges in our corner of the healthcare industry. 
They embrace strategies that minimize risk, leaning towards observability, alerting, metrics, high test coverage, and frequent releases that incrementally build value.
description:
As a Senior Software Engineer I at Aledade, we maintain, improve, and expand our web application and data pipelines. We're looking for engineers who know that writing new code is not always the solution to a problem, but when technological changes are needed they create secure, maintainable, performant, correct, scalable, and stable solutions to the complex and unique challenges in our corner of the healthcare industry. 
They embrace strategies that minimize risk, leaning towards observability, alerting, metrics, high test coverage, and frequent releases that incrementally build value.

lists.content:
• Develop and implement scalable and performant solutions.
  • Partner, as a peer, with Engineering Managers, Product Managers, and stakeholders throughout Aledade to develop and execute technical roadmaps using Agile processes.
  • Mentor and coach more junior engineers including thorough pull request reviews for other developers and be receptive to critical feedback on your own work.

• BS/BTech (or higher) in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field.
  • 4+ years experience as an engineer building full-stack web applications as part of a cross-functional team.
  • 3+ years of experience working with SQL or other database querying language on large multi-table data sets.
  • 2+ years of experience acting as a trusted technical decision-maker in a team setting, solving for short-term and long-term business value.
  • 2+ years of experience coaching other engineers.

• Experience building robust,scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using orchestration tools(e.g., Airflow).
  • Experience architecting and implementing batch and streaming data pipelines using Python ,Spark or SQL based technologies.
  • Experience implementing automation around validation and testing framework .
  • Proficiency in working with large datasets and knowledge of data storage technologies.
  • Experience working with data ingestion systems and optimizing performance for handling large-scale data processing and analysis.
  • Experience performance tuning existing workflows and introducing automation to reduce manual operational overhead and manual touch point. 
  • In-depth knowledge of database systems.
  • Familiarity with  database replication, sharding and other techniques for scalability and high availability of databases.
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
As a Senior II Engineer on the CI Pipeline team, you will serve as a primary architect of our CI/CD vision, helping to ensure that as Aledade scales, our delivery speed and compliance posture accelerate together. You will initially lead the evolution of a "Universal Pipeline" – the initiative to make the "Right Way" the "Easy Way" by building automation and guardrails to ensure every deployment is HIPAA-compliant by default.
 
Beyond the initial pipeline framework, you will be involved in the long-term strategy for our internal developer experience, moving into the test tooling infrastructure (interwoven into the CI pipeline), self-service tooling, and ephemeral environments to leverage those technologies. Your goal is to foster a high-velocity engineering culture where security, compliance, and audit evidence are seamless side-effects of a delivery lifecycle, not manual tasks.
description:
As a Senior II Engineer on the CI Pipeline team, you will serve as a primary architect of our CI/CD vision, helping to ensure that as Aledade scales, our delivery speed and compliance posture accelerate together. You will initially lead the evolution of a "Universal Pipeline" – the initiative to make the "Right Way" the "Easy Way" by building automation and guardrails to ensure every deployment is HIPAA-compliant by default.
 
Beyond the initial pipeline framework, you will be involved in the long-term strategy for our internal developer experience, moving into the test tooling infrastructure (interwoven into the CI pipeline), self-service tooling, and ephemeral environments to leverage those technologies. Your goal is to foster a high-velocity engineering culture where security, compliance, and audit evidence are seamless side-effects of a delivery lifecycle, not manual tasks.

lists.content:
• Develop and implement scalable and performant solutions.
  • Partner, as a peer, with Engineering Managers, Product Managers, and stakeholders throughout Aledade to develop and execute technical roadmaps using Agile processes.
  • Mentor and coach more junior engineers including thorough pull request reviews for other developers and be receptive to critical feedback on your own work.

• BS/BTech (or higher) in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field.
  • 6+ years experience as an engineer building and managing highly automated CI/CD infrastructure and developer tooling as part of a cross-functional team.
  • 3+ years of experience working with infrastructure-as-code and automation scripting (e.g., Python, Bash, or Go) to manage complex delivery pipelines.
  • 3+ years of experience acting as a trusted technical decision-maker in a team setting, solving for short-term and long-term business value.
  • 3+ years of experience coaching other engineers on testing strategies and pipeline integration.

•  
    • Engineering & Custom Tooling
  • Systems Programming: Proficiency in a high-level language (Python, Go, etc) to build custom CLI tools, internal providers, or API integrations that extend the capabilities of off-the-shelf CI/CD products.
  • Developer Experience (DX) Tooling: Experience building internal abstractions or "Golden Path" templates that simplify complex cloud interactions for product engineers.
  • Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Expert-level Terraform or Pulumi skills used to treat the entire delivery platform as a version-controlled, testable software product.
    • Test Infrastructure & Orchestration
  • Ephemeral Test Environments: Expertise in architecting "on-demand" testing environments (using Kubernetes/Namespaces or Docker) that allow developers to run full-stack integration tests within the pipeline.
  • Test Tooling Integration: Experience building or integrating frameworks for Contract Testing (e.g., Pact), Synthetic Testing, and Automated Regression at scale.
  • Mocking & Service Virtualization: Ability to provide engineers with the infrastructure needed to mock healthcare-specific dependencies (e.g., EHR simulators) within the CI flow.
    • Compliance & Security as Code
  • Automated Governance: Experience building "Compliance as Code" into pipelines, ensuring that SOC2, SOX, and HIPAA audit evidence (the "Triple-Lock" of Author, Approver, and Scan results) is captured automatically.
  • Secure Supply Chain: Proficiency in integrating security gates—including SAST, DAST, Secret Detection, and automated SBOM generation—into the automated delivery flow.
  • Identity & Secrets Management: Deep understanding of managing sensitive credentials and least-privilege access for CI/CD runners in a cloud environment (AWS preferred).
    • Pipeline Architecture & Reliability
  • Universal Pipeline Design: Expertise in building modular, reusable CI/CD templates (e.g., GitHub Actions) that standardize deployment patterns across diverse stacks (ECS, EKS, Databricks).
  • Build Optimization: Proven ability to optimize monorepo build performance through intelligent caching, change-detection, and parallelization.
  • Observability & DORA Metrics: Ability to instrument the delivery platform to track and improve core metrics like Deployment Frequency and Lead Time for Changes.
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

Beyond the initial pipeline framework, you will be involved in the long-term strategy for our internal developer experience, moving into the test tooling infrastructure (interwoven into the CI pipeline), self-service tooling, and ephemeral environments to leverage those technologies. descriptionPlain:
Aledade is dedicated to transforming value-based care through innovative technology. Our AI Platform team is at the forefront of this mission, building foundational tools, services, and infrastructure that empower internal product teams to seamlessly integrate cutting-edge AI capabilities into Aledade’s products and develop powerful internal AI solutions.

As a Technical Product Manager on the AI Platform team, you will:

Define and deliver the roadmap to drive execution and scale of the AI Platform that supports internal stakeholders and external AI products.
Operate at the intersection of machine learning systems, data engineering, and applied healthcare AI.
Partner closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and clinical leadership to deliver production-grade systems that support reliable inference pipelines across millions of patient records.
Contribute to the improvement of quality and cost of care for over 2 million patients served by Aledade providers.
description:
Aledade is dedicated to transforming value-based care through innovative technology. Our AI Platform team is at the forefront of this mission, building foundational tools, services, and infrastructure that empower internal product teams to seamlessly integrate cutting-edge AI capabilities into Aledade’s products and develop powerful internal AI solutions.
 
As a Senior Technical Product Manager on the AI Platform team, you will:
  • Define and deliver the roadmap to drive execution and scale of the AI Platform that supports internal stakeholders and external AI products.
  • Operate at the intersection of machine learning systems, data engineering, and applied healthcare AI.
  • Partner closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and clinical leadership to deliver production-grade systems that support reliable inference pipelines across millions of patient records.
  • Contribute to the improvement of quality and cost of care for over 2 million patients served by Aledade providers.

lists.content:
• Partner with business owners to cultivate a shared vision for the problem space, constraints, priorities, and ideal end state, and be able to articulate and advocate for this perspective.
  • Lead the full lifecycle of ML and LLM platform workstreams—from data ingestion, training, and deployment to ongoing optimization of live user workflows based on performance metrics and feedback.
  • Work with internal teams and end users to develop a deep understanding of requirements, perform thoughtful solution design, use data to test hypotheses, and support teams throughout execution.
  • Write detailed user stories for new features, capturing descriptions of business rationale, requirements, and success criteria defined by measurable outcomes.
  • Develop short- and long-term roadmaps that deliver maximum value with minimum risk and assume ongoing iteration.
  • Partner with AI Researchers to mature proofs-of-concept into production-ready capabilities; perform exploration of user feedback, healthcare records, and validation data to validate model performance.

• 8+ years of product management experience in technology, technology-enabled services, or SaaS.
  • Strong understanding of artificial intelligence and/or machine learning technologies.
  • Experience using data and primary research to inform solution design and build business understanding.
  • Familiarity with Agile teams, Jira, and the software development lifecycle.
  • Knowledge of APIs, DevOps, enterprise software development, and cloud infrastructure (e.g., Databricks, AWS, GCP, Azure).
  • Understanding of data engineering principles.
  • Ability to communicate technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.
  • Skilled at translating ambiguous product requirements into a technical roadmap.

• Experience leading AI/ML platform products and scaling platforms vertically and horizontally.
  • Track record of building and launching AI/ML platforms, tools, or internal services.
  • Deep knowledge of AI/ML product lifecycle, MLOps, and scalable AI infrastructure (training, deployment, monitoring, observability, reliability).
  • Experience with large language models (LLMs) and generative AI technologies, including prompt engineering strategies and VLMs.
  • Background as a data scientist or backend engineer.
  • Fluency in translating technical concepts into value propositions and storytelling for diverse stakeholders.
  • Clinical Data Literacy: Familiarity with EHR data, Claims, or population health datasets.
  • Experience in healthcare technology environments, particularly physician-facing products or work with clinical datasets (EHR, Claims, Population Health datasets).
• Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboards. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

text: Senior Technical Product Manager - AI Platform, Remote
descriptionBody:
Aledade is dedicated to transforming value-based care through innovative technology. Our AI Platform team is at the forefront of this mission, building foundational tools, services, and infrastructure that empower internal product teams to seamlessly integrate cutting-edge AI capabilities into Aledade’s products and develop powerful internal AI solutions.
 
As a Senior Technical Product Manager on the AI Platform team, you will:
  • Define and deliver the roadmap to drive execution and scale of the AI Platform that supports internal stakeholders and external AI products.
  • Operate at the intersection of machine learning systems, data engineering, and applied healthcare AI.
  • Partner closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and clinical leadership to deliver production-grade systems that support reliable inference pipelines across millions of patient records.
  • Contribute to the improvement of quality and cost of care for over 2 million patients served by Aledade providers.
descriptionBodyPlain:

Define and deliver the roadmap to drive execution and scale of the AI Platform that supports internal stakeholders and external AI products.
Operate at the intersection of machine learning systems, data engineering, and applied healthcare AI.
Partner closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and clinical leadership to deliver production-grade systems that support reliable inference pipelines across millions of patient records.
Contribute to the improvement of quality and cost of care for over 2 million patients served by Aledade providers.

additionalPlain:
Who We Are:
Aledade, a public benefit corporation, exists to empower the most transformational part of our health care landscape - independent primary care. We were founded in 2014, and since then, we've become the largest network of independent primary care in the country - helping practices, health centers and clinics deliver better care to their patients and thrive in value-based care. Additionally, by creating value-based contracts across a wide variety of health plans, we aim to flip the script on the traditional fee-for-service model. Our work strengthens continuity of care, aligns incentives and ensures primary care physicians are paid for what they do best - keeping patients healthy. If you want to help create a health care system that is good for patients, good for practices and good for society - and if you're eager to join a collaborative, inclusive and remote-first culture - you've come to the right place.

What Does This Mean for You?
At Aledade, you will be part of a creative culture that is driven by a passion for tackling complex issues with respect, open-mindedness and a desire to learn. You will collaborate with team members who bring a wide range of experiences, interests, backgrounds, beliefs and achievements to their work - and who are all united by a shared passion for public health and a commitment to the Aledade mission.

In addition to time off to support work-life balance and enjoyment, we offer the following comprehensive benefits package designed for the overall well-being of our team members:

Flexible work schedules and the ability to work remotely are available for many roles
Health, dental and vision insurance paid up to 80% for employees, dependents and domestic partners
Robust time-off plan (21 days of PTO in your first year)
Two paid volunteer days and 11 paid holidays
12 weeks paid parental leave for all new parents
Six weeks paid sabbatical after six years of service
Educational Assistant Program and Clinical Employee Reimbursement Program
401(k) with up to 4% match
Stock options
And much more!

At Aledade, we don’t just accept differences, we celebrate them! We strive to attract, develop and retain highly qualified individuals representing the diverse communities where we live and work. Aledade is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Employment policies and decisions at Aledade are based on merit, qualifications, performance and business needs. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, race, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth or medical conditions related to pregnancy or childbirth), gender identity or expression, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, legally protected genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or sexual orientation.

lists.content:
• Partner with business owners to cultivate a shared vision for the problem space, constraints, priorities and ideal end state, and be able to articulate and advocate for this perspective.
  • Lead the full lifecycle of ML and LLM platform workstreams;  from data ingestion, training, and deployment to the ongoing optimization of live user workflows based on performance metrics and feedback
  • Work with internal teams and end users to develop a deep understanding of requirements, perform thoughtful solution design, use data to test hypotheses, and support teams throughout execution.
  • Write detailed user stories for new features, capturing detailed descriptions of business rationale, requirements, and success criteria that are defined by measurable outcomes.
  • Develop short- and long-term roadmaps that deliver maximum value with minimum risk and assume ongoing iteration.
  • Partner with AI Researchers to mature proofs-of-concept into production-ready capabilities.
  • Perform hands-on exploration of user feedback, healthcare records and validation data to validate model performance.

• 8+ years of product management experience in technology, technology-enabled services industry, or a SaaS product.
  • Robust understanding of artificial intelligence and/or machine learning, and related technologies.
  • Experience using data and primary research to inform solution design and build internal business understanding.
  • Experience with Agile teams, Jira, and understanding of the software development lifecycle
  • Strong understanding of APIs, DevOps, enterprise software development, cloud infrastructure (databricks/AWS/GCP/Azure), and data engineering principles.
  • Exceptional ability to communicate technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders.
  • Comfortable with translating ambiguous product requirements into a technical roadmap

• Experience working on or leading products for an AI/ML platform team and building a platform to scale vertically and horizontally.
  • Proven track record of building and launching AI/ML platforms, tools, or internal services that enable other product teams.
  • Deep understanding of the AI/ML product lifecycle, MLOps, and scalable AI infrastructure (e.g., model training, deployment, monitoring, observability, reliability).
  • Experience with large language models (LLMs) and generative AI technologies, including prompt engineering strategies and VLMs.
  • Experience working as a data scientist or backend engineer.
  • Strong ability to translate technical concepts and platform capabilities into value propositions and storytelling skills to communicate to diverse internal stakeholders.
  • Clinical Data Literacy: Familiarity with EHR data, Claims, or population health datasets.
  • Experience in a healthcare technology environment, including physician-facing products or working with clinical datasets (EHR data, Claims, Population Health datasets, etc).
Sitting for prolonged periods of time. Extensive use of computers and keyboard. Occasional walking and lifting may be required.

descriptionPlain:
As a Senior Technical Product Manager, Clinical Data Platform, you will be a key member of the team responsible for designing scalable technical, service, and content solutions that Support Aledade’s various lines of business, with a focus on Medicare Advantage and clinical data integration.
 
In this role, you will partner with business owners, data analysts, engineers and clinical informaticists to define project goals, solution scope, implementation approaches, and rollout plans. You will play a critical role in expanding the platforms ability to ingest, standardize and serve clinical data at scale, including structured and unstructured data, to power downstream use cases.
 
You will help identify and productionize AI/ML capabilities that extract and improve clinical insights from unstructured data and enhance data quality and completeness. As a platform focused product manager, you will bridge the gap between strategic business needs and core platform capabilities, ensuring Aledade delivers a high-quality, future ready clinical data foundation that can support AI innovation and scale operationally.
description:
As a Senior Technical Product Manager, Clinical Data Platform, you will be a key member of the team responsible for designing scalable technical, service, and content solutions that Support Aledade’s various lines of business, with a focus on Medicare Advantage and clinical data integration.
 
In this role, you will partner with business owners, data analysts, engineers and clinical informaticists to define project goals, solution scope, implementation approaches, and rollout plans. You will play a critical role in expanding the platforms ability to ingest, standardize and serve clinical data at scale, including structured and unstructured data, to power downstream use cases.
 
You will help identify and productionize AI/ML capabilities that extract and improve clinical insights from unstructured data and enhance data quality and completeness. As a platform focused product manager, you will bridge the gap between strategic business needs and core platform capabilities, ensuring Aledade delivers a high-quality, future ready clinical data foundation that can support AI innovation and scale operationally.

lists.content:
• Partner with business owners to cultivate a shared vision for the problem space, constraints, priorities and ideal end state, and be able to articulate and advocate for this perspective. 
  • Ongoing optimization of live user workflows and capabilities including monitoring of key metrics & internal user feedback
  • Work with internal teams and end users to develop a deep understanding of requirements, perform thoughtful technical solution designs, use data to test hypotheses, and support teams throughout execution.
  • Write detailed user stories for new features, capturing detailed descriptions of business rationale, requirements, and success criteria that are defined by measurable outcomes.
  • Develop short- and long-term roadmaps that deliver maximum value with minimum risk and assume ongoing iteration.

• 8+ years of product management experience in healthcare technology, technology-enabled services industry, or a SaaS product.
  • Experience using data and primary research to inform solution design and build internal business understanding.
  • Experience with and understanding of the software development lifecycle and software development methodologies, including experience managing within Agile and Scrum teams.  
  • Product development experience in the context of the development of a healthcare technology product.

• Excellent organizational and communication skills with an emphasis on problem-solving and building subject matter expertise.
  • Intermediate understanding of EHR data integration and applicable data standards, including FHIR, QRDA, CCDA, SNOMED CT, LOINC, ICD-10, CPT and RxNorm
  • Experience applying project management principles and techniques with an eye towards execution. To include skills in leading and managing change within the team and initiative more broadly.
  • Knowledge of healthcare administrative and clinical data sets, including demographics, financials, encounters, labs, diagnoses, and medications.
  • Familiarity with software development environments, version control systems and basic coding or scripting languages to better communicate with development teams and participate in technical discussions.
  • Basic understanding of clinical workflows across inpatient, ambulatory, and ancillary care settings, including how data is captured and used in EHR systems.
  • Experience working with EHR, practice management, revenue cycle tools, or population health platforms to support clinical or operational use cases..
  • Experience with clinical datasets to ensure accurate patient record linkage, data integration, and interoperability between clinical, administrative and claims data sources.
  • Experience applying NLP and/or ML techniques for extracting structured clinical insights from free-text data (e.g., clinical notes, CCDAs, scanned documents).
  • Experience working with clinical data pipelines including ingestion, normalization, and mapping to standardized terminologies and schemas.
  • Proficient in SQL, with experience querying large healthcare datasets in PostgresSQL or similar environments.
  • Experience using Databricks to manage, process and analyze large-scale clinical data using Spark SQL, Delta Lake, and data pipelines, particularly for clinical interoperability workflows.
